mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(res_member_store_type), ''), '기타' ) as category, SUM(res_used_amount) as totalAmount, COUNT(*) as transactionCount, AVG(res_used_amount) as averageAmount, ROUND((SUM(res_used_amount) * 100.0 / ( SELECT SUM(res_used_amount) FROM mydata_card_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND res_used_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND res_cancel_yn = '0' )), 2) as categoryRatio FROM mydata_card_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND res_used_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND res_cancel_yn = '0' -- 취소되지 않은 거래만 GROUP BY category HAVING totalAmount > 0 ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(res_used_amount), 0) as totalSpend FROM mydata_card_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND res_used_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND res_cancel_yn = 'N'

SELECT COALESCE(cp.card_product_id, mch.card_id) as cardProductId, COALESCE(cp.name, mch.card_name) as name, COALESCE(cp.type, '신용') as type, COALESCE(cp.is_available, 1) as isAvailable, cp.issuer_id as issuerId, COALESCE(cp.annual_fee, 0) as annualFee, cp.pre_month_money as preMonthMoney, cp.online_only as onlineOnly, cp.card_image_url as cardImageUrl, cp.request_pc_url as requestPcUrl, cp.request_mobile_url as requestMobileUrl, cp.annual_fee_detail as annualFeeDetail, cp.corp_pr_container as corpPrContainer, cp.corp_pr_detail as corpPrDetail, cp.corp_tips as corpTips, cp.created_time as createdTime, cp.last_modified_time as lastModifiedTime, cp.persona_id as personaId, COALESCE(cp.issuer, '기타') as issuer, mch.holding_id as holdingId -- holding_id 추가 FROM mydata_card_holdings mch LEFT JOIN card_product cp ON cp.card_product_id = mch.card_id WHERE mch.user_id = #{userId} AND mch.res_state = '정상' -- 정상 상태인 카드만 ORDER BY mch.card_id DESC -- 최근 등록순

SELECT card_product_id as cardProductId, name, type, is_available as isAvailable, issuer_id as issuerId, annual_fee as annualFee, pre_month_money as preMonthMoney, online_only as onlineOnly, card_image_url as cardImageUrl, request_pc_url as requestPcUrl, request_mobile_url as requestMobileUrl, annual_fee_detail as annualFeeDetail, corp_pr_container as corpPrContainer, corp_pr_detail as corpPrDetail, corp_tips as corpTips, created_time as createdTime, last_modified_time as lastModifiedTime, persona_id as personaId, issuer FROM card_product WHERE type = #{cardType} AND is_available = 1
AND card_product_id NOT IN
#{cardId}
ORDER BY pre_month_money ASC, name ASC

SELECT parsed_benefit_id as parsedBenefitId, card_id2, title, category, benefit_type as benefitType, value, condition_text as conditionText, max_benefit_monthly as maxBenefitMonthly, min_spend_per_transaction as minSpendPerTransaction, pre_month_money_specific as preMonthMoneySpecific, description, created_time as createdTime, last_modified_time as lastModifiedTime FROM card_parsed_benefit WHERE card_id2 = #{cardId} ORDER BY parsed_benefit_id

SELECT card_product_id as cardProductId, name, type, is_available as isAvailable, issuer_id as issuerId, annual_fee as annualFee, pre_month_money as preMonthMoney, online_only as onlineOnly, card_image_url as cardImageUrl, request_pc_url as requestPcUrl, request_mobile_url as requestMobileUrl, annual_fee_detail as annualFeeDetail, corp_pr_container as corpPrContainer, corp_pr_detail as corpPrDetail, corp_tips as corpTips, created_time as createdTime, last_modified_time as lastModifiedTime, persona_id as personaId, issuer FROM card_product WHERE card_product_id = #{cardId}

SELECT COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(mct.res_member_store_type), ''), '기타' ) as category, SUM(mct.res_used_amount) as totalAmount, COUNT(*) as transactionCount, AVG(mct.res_used_amount) as averageAmount, ROUND((SUM(mct.res_used_amount) * 100.0 / ( SELECT SUM(t2.res_used_amount) FROM mydata_card_transactions t2 INNER JOIN mydata_card_holdings h2 ON t2.holding_id = h2.holding_id WHERE t2.user_id = #{userId} AND h2.card_id = #{cardId} AND t2.res_used_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND t2.res_cancel_yn IN ('N', '0') )), 2) as categoryRatio FROM mydata_card_transactions mct INNER JOIN mydata_card_holdings mch ON mct.holding_id = mch.holding_id WHERE mct.user_id = #{userId} AND mch.card_id = #{cardId} -- card_product_id로 조회 AND mct.res_used_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND mct.res_cancel_yn IN ('N', '0') -- 취소되지 않은 거래만 GROUP BY category HAVING totalAmount > 0 ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(mct.res_used_amount), 0) as totalSpend FROM mydata_card_transactions mct INNER JOIN mydata_card_holdings mch ON mct.holding_id = mch.holding_id WHERE mct.user_id = #{userId} AND mch.card_id = #{cardId} -- card_product_id로 조회 AND mct.res_used_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND mct.res_cancel_yn IN ('N', '0')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_card_recommendations ( user_id, base_card_id, card_id, card_name, card_type, issuer, estimated_benefit, annual_fee, pre_month_money, card_image_url, request_pc_url, request_mobile_url ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{baseCardId}, #{cardId}, #{cardName}, #{cardType}, #{issuer}, #{estimatedBenefit}, #{annualFee}, #{preMonthMoney}, #{cardImageUrl}, #{requestPcUrl}, #{requestMobileUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT recommendation_id as recommendationId, user_id as userId, base_card_id as baseCardId, card_id as cardId, card_name as cardName, card_type as cardType, issuer, estimated_benefit as estimatedBenefit, annual_fee as annualFee, pre_month_money as preMonthMoney, card_image_url as cardImageUrl, request_pc_url as requestPcUrl, request_mobile_url as requestMobileUrl, recommended_at as recommendedAt FROM user_card_recommendations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND base_card_id = #{baseCardId} ORDER BY estimated_benefit DESC

SELECT recommendation_id as recommendationId, user_id as userId, base_card_id as baseCardId, card_id as cardId, card_name as cardName, card_type as cardType, issuer, estimated_benefit as estimatedBenefit, annual_fee as annualFee, pre_month_money as preMonthMoney, card_image_url as cardImageUrl, request_pc_url as requestPcUrl, request_mobile_url as requestMobileUrl, recommended_at as recommendedAt FROM user_card_recommendations WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY recommended_at DESC, base_card_id ASC

SELECT card_product_id as cardProductId, name, type, is_available as isAvailable, issuer_id as issuerId, annual_fee as annualFee, pre_month_money as preMonthMoney, online_only as onlineOnly, card_image_url as cardImageUrl, request_pc_url as requestPcUrl, request_mobile_url as requestMobileUrl, annual_fee_detail as annualFeeDetail, corp_pr_container as corpPrContainer, corp_pr_detail as corpPrDetail, corp_tips as corpTips, created_time as createdTime, last_modified_time as lastModifiedTime, persona_id as personaId, issuer FROM card_product WHERE issuer = #{issuer} AND is_available = 1 ORDER BY pre_month_money ASC, name ASC

SELECT card_product_id as cardProductId, name, type, is_available as isAvailable, issuer_id as issuerId, annual_fee as annualFee, pre_month_money as preMonthMoney, online_only as onlineOnly, card_image_url as cardImageUrl, request_pc_url as requestPcUrl, request_mobile_url as requestMobileUrl, annual_fee_detail as annualFeeDetail, corp_pr_container as corpPrContainer, corp_pr_detail as corpPrDetail, corp_tips as corpTips, created_time as createdTime, last_modified_time as lastModifiedTime, persona_id as personaId, issuer FROM card_product WHERE issuer = #{issuer} AND is_available = 1 ORDER BY pre_month_money ASC, name ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM card_product WHERE issuer = #{issuer} AND is_available = 1

SELECT COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(mct.res_member_store_type), ''), '기타' ) as category, SUM(mct.res_used_amount) as totalAmount, COUNT(*) as transactionCount, AVG(mct.res_used_amount) as averageAmount, ROUND((SUM(mct.res_used_amount) * 100.0 / ( SELECT SUM(t2.res_used_amount) FROM mydata_card_transactions t2 WHERE t2.user_id = #{userId} AND t2.holding_id = #{holdingId} AND t2.res_used_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND t2.res_cancel_yn IN ('N', '0') )), 2) as categoryRatio FROM mydata_card_transactions mct WHERE mct.user_id = #{userId} AND mct.holding_id = #{holdingId} AND mct.res_used_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y%m%d') AND mct.res_cancel_yn IN ('N', '0') GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(mct.res_member_store_type), ''), '기타') HAVING SUM(mct.res_used_amount) > 0 ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
